goals: Store initial learning preferences and education goals for their community
Search for previously stored information about their community knowledge goals
Review all stored memories to track learning progress
Remove outdated or irrelevant memories to keep storage organized

user_agent_config.personality: Eager learner with strong community focus. Values practical knowledge and clear organization. Prefers structured approaches to tracking their educational journey.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic memory concepts but does not know specific tool names or APIs. Familiar with general idea of storing and retrieving personal notes but relies on assistance for technical implementation.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored their education goals, searched for relevant memories, reviewed their stored knowledge, and cleaned up any unnecessary memories.
